# AI-Native Go (stack:org.vibevm.ai-native/go-ai-native)

The family aggregator for the Go projection of the AI-Native Code
Discipline. Content-minimal by design (PROP-028): installing this one
package pulls the whole family at one resolved version set —

- `stack:org.vibevm.ai-native/go-ai-native-lang` — the guide, the nine
  scaffold cards, and the runnable toolchain (`go-ai-native`,
  `go-ai-native-conform`, `go-ai-native-specmap`, `go-ai-native-tcg`);
- `mcp:org.vibevm.ai-native/go-ai-native-mcp` — the same toolchain served
  over MCP;
- transitively, `flow:org.vibevm.ai-native/core-ai-native` — the
  language-neutral method.

No code, no boot snippet, no policy lives here; see the `-lang` stack's
README for everything.
